title: Blue Whale Gifts Set of 4 Plastic Christmas Drinking Cups for Kids, Swirling Spiral Lid and Straw
features: Set of 4 Plastic Christmas Drinking Cups for Kids - Swirling Spiral Lid and Straw
They make children a lot of fun this Christmas. Complete set of 4 plastic tumblers, with a spiral bendable straw and lid.
Each set contains: 1 x Santa Tumbler, 1 x Snowman Tumbler, 1 x Reindeer Drinking Cup and 1 x Penguin Tumbler.
Large tumblers with fun festive designs. A wonderful gift for your home.
